meta.title: Troubleshooting Guide
meta.excerpt: Common issues, debugging techniques, and resolution strategies for production systems.

seo.metaDescription: Debug and resolve common production issues quickly.

props.text: Systematic troubleshooting requires understanding your system's logs, metrics, and error patterns.

props.title: High CPU Usage
props.body: Check for runaway loops, memory pressure, and expensive database queries.

Application logs
• System metrics
• Database performance
• Error tracking
• Real user monitoring

props.title: Production Debugging
props.body: Test remediations in staging before rolling changes to production.

props.text: Follow a systematic debugging workflow to identify and resolve issues efficiently.

props.body:
Reproduce the issue in a controlled environment
• Check recent deployments and code changes
• Review application logs for errors and warnings
• Examine system metrics (CPU, memory, disk, network)
• Verify external service availability and latency
• Test fix in staging environment
• Deploy fix with monitoring
• Document root cause and resolution

features.title: Reproduce
features.description: Isolate the issue in a controlled environment

features.title: Investigate
features.description: Gather logs, metrics, and error traces

props.text: Effective log analysis helps quickly identify root causes and patterns in production issues.

props.code:
# View recent errors in Vercel logs
vercel logs --follow

# Filter for specific error patterns
vercel logs | grep "ERROR"

# Search for specific request ID
vercel logs | grep "request-id: abc123"

# Count error occurrences
vercel logs | grep "ERROR" | wc -l

# View application logs with timestamps
pnpm run dev | bunyan -o short
props.title: Common Log Analysis Commands
Structured Logging
props.body: Use structured logging with consistent fields (timestamp, level, requestId, userId) to enable powerful log queries and aggregations.

props.title: Build Failures
props.body: Check for TypeScript errors, missing dependencies, or environment variable issues. Review build logs in CI/CD pipeline.

props.title: API Timeout Issues
props.body: Increase timeout limits, optimize slow queries, implement caching, or add request retry logic with exponential backoff.

props.title: Memory Leaks
props.body: Use Node.js heap snapshots, check for unclosed connections, review event listener cleanup, and monitor memory metrics over time.
